programme.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 13
programme.desc: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in 2013. City needed three points to close the gap at the top to Man Utd, while the Reds were chasing a top four spot.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Cardiff v Wolves
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Cardiff City host Wolves at the Cardiff City Stadium in 2018 in a match that had a dramatic ending.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Leeds
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds United at Pride Park in a Championship match that saw five goals.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: West Brom v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, West Brom take on Leeds United at The Hawthorns in a high-scoring Championship match that saw one side dominate.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: A. Villa v Birmingham
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Birmingham City at Villa Park in a high-scoring Second City derby.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Aston Villa v N. Forest
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Nottingham Forest at Villa Park in an enthralling, end-to-end encounter that saw 10 goals.

programme.title: WTA Final: Rouen

programme.desc: York Knights clash with Toulouse Olympique in the Betfred Super League.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

programme.title: EFL 16/17:Birmingham v Aston Villa
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, local rivals Birmingham City and Aston Villa clash in the Sky Bet Championship at St Andrew's in October 2016.

programme.title: EFL 09/10: Sheff Utd v Sheff Weds
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Sheffield United and Sheffield Wednesday meet in a thrilling Steel City derby in September 2009.

programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Joburg Ladies Open, a Ladies European Event held at Randpark Golf Club. England's Mimi Rhodes clinched victory this time a year ago.

programme.desc: Day three of the Investec South Africa Women's Open - a Ladies European Tour event at Royal Cape Golf Club. French golfer Perrine Delacour scooped victory at this event last season.

programme.desc: Warrington Wolves host Hull FC in the Betfred Super League. The Black and Whites fell on home soil previously to the Rhinos, while Warrington also tasted defeat to the Red Devils. (03.05)

programme.desc: London Mavericks meet AO Manchester Thunder in the NSL. Thunder overturned a deficit at the break to overcome LexisNexis Dragons last time out, with Nicola Smith the star of the show.

programme.desc: Taking just two points from their last five Bundesliga matches, Hamburg welcome Christian Ilzer's Hoffenheim - who are on course to register their best ever top-flight points tally

programme.title: Crime Patrol 2.0

programme.title: Souten The Other Woman
programme.desc: After the sudden death of her lover, Mitali gets married to a wealthy widower, Ranbeer. However, her secrets are soon revealed.

programme.title: Ajnabee Saaya
programme.desc: Rakesh's wife dies, then returns. He's shocked and suspicious, trying to uncover her identity.

programme.title: Ahankaar
programme.desc: Prabhat loses his voice in a freak accident while trying to save his stepmother. However, this sacrifice and many others go unappreciated by a family largely filled with selfish and unethical people.

programme.title: Dard
programme.desc: A man takes the blame for a crime he didn't commit to ensure his sister's happiness and safety. When he is released from jail, he learns that the woman he loved is no more.

programme.title: Junoon
programme.desc: Vikram is badly injured and his friend is killed by a cursed tiger. He soon learns that the curse has been passed onto him and he will turn into a tiger on a full moon night.

programme.title: Amar Prem
programme.desc: Romantic drama with Rajesh Khanna and Sharmila Tagore .The music by R. D. Burman in this movie proved to be one of the best scores of his career, with hits like Raina beeti jaaye.

programme.title: Izzat
programme.desc: An honest cop is framed for a murder when he starts investigating a scam. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

programme.title: Paap Ki Duniya
programme.desc: Angry Suraj seeks revenge for his father. Battling corrupt underworld figures. He teams up with Rani, a dancer, diving into a dangerous world of crime and betrayal.

programme.title: Pyar Diwana Hota Hai
programme.desc: A villager pretends to be disabled in order to be near an NRI.

programme.title: Conversation With Rajkummar Rao 1
programme.desc: Rajkummar Rao, one of the most talented and versatile actors today, talks about his being an outsider to the industry, the different shades of unique characters he plays and his success. (1/2)

programme.title: Dooriyan
programme.desc: A married couple struggles to balance their personal and professional life which causes them to separate and it affects their child.

programme.title: Comedy Station - Dr Pran Lele
programme.desc: DR PRAN LELE, A quirky, mad-cap doctor - Dr. Pran Lele along with his crazy Nurse CPR is here to provide an abundant dose of LOLs & ROFLs as they treat their celebrity patients in their unique ways.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Sanam
programme.desc: Rajesh works for Meena's father. Meena and her friend Taruna decide to play a prank on him. Both women pretend to fall in love with him, but he finds out, resulting in acrimony.

programme.title: Ishq Hai Tumse
programme.desc: Arjun, a Hindu, falls in love with Khushbu, a Muslim. However, he is unable to profess his feelings for her due to his family's opposition to her religion.

programme.title: Aashiqui
programme.desc: An aspiring singer meets a beautiful woman unexpectedly in a police station. He chases after her and eventually they start dating each other, but they have to deal with many problems thereafter.

programme.title: Man Ki Aankhen
programme.desc: Rajesh is in love with his teacher's daughter and marries her in secret as he fears the wrath of his dowry-seeking mother. He hopes his mother will accept his new wife

programme.title: Akayla
programme.desc: Inspector Vijay Verma finally manages to capture criminal mastermind Jojo. But Jojo escapes from jail and kills Vijay's friends for revenge, leaving Vijay determined to fulfil a vendetta of his own.

programme.title: Insaaf Ki Awaaz
programme.desc: Inspector Jhansi is an honest police officer. Her brother Ravi falls in love with her rival's daughter. When the girl's father comes to know about his daughter's relationship, he is enraged.

programme.title: Ludo
programme.desc: Four wildly different stories overlap at the whims of fate, chance and one eccentric criminal.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Kabir Singh
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Afwaah
programme.desc: A woman seeks to escape her engagement to a violent politician, but when a stranger comes to her aid, the two face an onslaught of bigotry and hate.

programme.title: Gumraah
programme.desc: The murder investigation into a young man's death takes an unexpected turn when the cops discover that the prime suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: Kuch Naa Kaho
programme.desc: A secretary's manager tells her to find a match for his nephew who does not want to get married. The nephew rejects every proposal and falls in love with the secretary instead.

programme.title: Jai Mummy Di
programme.desc: The trials and tribulations a couple has to undergo due to the dynamics between their respective mothers.

programme.title: Gulabo Sitabo
programme.desc: Two scheming men get caught up in a game of one-up-manship, each one attracting other members to their clan and each one with an agenda of his own.

programme.title: The Making Of Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Rocky Handsome
programme.desc: John Abraham plays reclusive pawn shop owner who sets his sights on revenge when vicious gangsters kidnap his drug-addicted neighbours daughter. Heart-stopping action adventure.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh - 2019
programme.desc: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman.

programme.title: Satyameva Jayate 2
programme.desc: In a fight against corruption, several people take a mighty stand to put an end to the social evils and establish a law-abiding society.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Piku
programme.desc: Critically acclaimed comedy about the relationship between a daughter (Deepika Padukone) and her aging father (Amitabh Bachchan), whose eccentricities drive everyone crazy.

programme.title: Nikamma
programme.desc: An unemployed carefree young man is at loggerheads with his more diligent sister-in-law. However, they must join forces to defeat a common enemy.

programme.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
programme.desc: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up. However, life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

programme.title: Khandani Shafakhana
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Tere Ishk Mein
programme.desc: Shankar and Mukti's intense love story unfolds against the backdrop of Benaras, exploring surrender and transformation that heals, hurts and changes them.

programme.desc: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

programme.title: Doomwatch
programme.desc: The Battery People. 1970. Stars Simon Oates, Jeremy Young & Emrys Jones. The Doomwatch team look into serious health issues experienced by workers at a Welsh factory farm. [S]

programme.title: Penny Gold
programme.desc: 1973. Drama. Director Jack Cardiff. Stars James Booth, Francesca Annis & Nicky Henson. Mathew is determined to crack the murder of a young woman whose body is identified by her identical twin. [S]

programme.title: Gold Is Where You Find It
programme.desc: Director: Francis Searle. Stars Eddie Byrne, Dermot Kelly. Steve returns to Ireland after 20 years a millionaire. When he gets drunk and loses his gold nuggets, everyone thinks there's a gold rush.

programme.title: Look At Life Watch on the Coast
programme.desc: 1968. A short film following the work of the Coastguards who secure Britain's coasts.

programme.title: Burke's Law
programme.desc: 1964. Who Killed What's His Name? Directed by Don Taylor. Stars Gene Barry, Gary Conway & Regis Toomey. The elaborate robbery of a bank ends with the unprovoked shooting death of its owner.

programme.title: Emergency Call
programme.desc: 1952. Drama. A young child must have a blood transfusion, but she has a rare blood group. Can a donor be found? Starring Jack Warner and Anthony Steel. [S]

programme.title: To Have And To Hold
programme.desc: 1951. Drama. Director: Godfrey Grayson. Stars Avis Scott, Patrick Barr & Robert Ayres. Following a riding accident, a countryman spends his final days arranging the future security of his family. [S]

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: 1947. Drama. Director Delmer Daves and starring Edward G Robinson, Lon McCallister, Judith Anderson and Rory Calhoun. Two girls, when told not to, explore mysterious woodland and discover secrets. [S]

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: 1996. Drama. Director: Richard Laxton. Stars John Bowe, Mel Martin, Michael Attwell. Set in the 19th century, this epic tale follows the Poldark family, their tangled destinies and a family feud. [S]

programme.title: The Edgar Wallace Mystery Theatre
programme.desc: Playback. 1962. Directed by Quentin Lawrence. Stars Margit Saad, Barry Foster & Victoria Platt. A Police officer awaits a life-changing verdict and reflects on his own arrest. [S]

programme.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: A Guest for The Gallows. 1955. Stars Richard Greene, Victor Woolf & Archie Duncan. For obvious reasons, Robin and the Sheriff are sworn enemies. Why then should the Sheriff seek Robin's help? [S]

programme.title: Last Holiday
programme.desc: 1950. Drama. Directed by Henry Cass. Stars Alec Guinness, Beatrice Campbell & Kay Walsh. A salesman who learns he has months to live cashes in his savings to live in a fancy hotel. [S]

programme.title: The Cheaters
programme.desc: The Man Who Wouldn't Be Paid. 1961. Stars John Ireland & Ian Fleming. Benjamin Clarke buys a rare book for a fraction of its real worth and puts himself at the mercy of his gold-digging family. [S]

programme.title: Cactus Flower
programme.desc: 1969. Comedy. Directed by Gene Saks. Stars Walter Matthau, Ingrid Bergman & Goldie Hawn. A dentist convinces his assistant to pose as his wife so he can avoid marrying his girlfriend. [S]

programme.title: Z-Cars
programme.desc: By the Book. 1963. Stars Joseph Brady, Brian Blessed & John Phillips. While Barlow leads the inquiry into the murder of an 8 year old boy, PC Weir and Smith are tasked with finding a green bike. [S]

programme.title: Public Eye
programme.desc: 1969. Detective & Mystery Drama. The Comedian's Graveyard. Stars Alfred Burke, Peter Badger & Mona Bruce. Frank is instructed to find a stage-struck teenager who has run away from home. [S]

programme.title: The Reckless Moment
programme.desc: 1949. Drama. Director: Max Ophuls. Stars James Mason, Joan Bennett & Geraldine Brooks. Finding her daughter's lover dead, a housewife takes desperate measures to protect her family from scandal. [S]

programme.title: Cellar Club with Caroline Munro
programme.desc: Caroline Munro opens the Cellar Club, introducing The Omega Factor! Enjoy this strange and supernatural series to begin tonight's show. [S]

programme.title: The Omega Factor
programme.desc: The Undiscovered Country. 1979. Stars James Hazeldine, Louise Jameson & John Carlisle. John Crane is fascinated with the occult. He challenges the dangerous Drexil but comes to a tragic result. [S]

programme.title: Cellar Club with Caroline Munro
programme.desc: Up next, Caroline Munro is here to introduce the 1977 film, A Saint, A Woman, A Devil. [S]

programme.title: A Saint, A Woman, A Devil
programme.desc: 1977. Drama. Director: Peter Savage. Stars Joanna Bell, Marc Stevens & Sonny Landham. Sylvia is a seemingly quiet and saintly person. But she is hiding a promiscuous multiple personality disorder. [S]

programme.title: Cellar Club with Caroline Munro
programme.desc: Caroline Munro closes the Cellar Club tonight, but not before giving us a peak into what is coming up next week. [S]

programme.title: Too Young To Love
programme.desc: 1959. Directed by Muriel Box. Stars Jess Conrad, Pauline Hahn, Joan Miller & Austin Willis. Based on the play, Pickup Girl by Elsa Shelley. A story of a young girl's lapse into sex delinquency. [S]

programme.title: As Long as They're Happy
programme.desc: 1955. Comedy. Directed by J. Lee Thompson. Stars Jack Buchanan, Janette Scott, Jean Carson. In England, an American singer causes havoc when he stays with a stockbroker's family by mistake. [S]

programme.title: Look At Life Bronze, Silver and Gold
programme.desc: 1969. A fascinating look at the challenge provided by the Duke Of Edinburgh's Award scheme to children in Britain.

programme.title: Out of Town
programme.desc: Sweetheart Story/Tyring a Cart. 1986. Jack shows a film of a house sale he attended in Berkshire and recounts the story of two lovers at opposite ends of the Edwardian social ladder. [S]

programme.title: Captain Scarlett
programme.desc: 1953. Adventure. Director: Thomas Carr. Stars Richard Greene, Leonora Amar & Manolo Fabregas. Scarlett returns to France to find the Duke of Corlaine seizing property and terrorising resistors. [S]

programme.title: What's On TPTV With Noel
programme.desc: Founder of Talking Pictures TV and one half of the Footage Detectives, Noel Cronin, shares shows and films not to be missed throughout April and May. [S]

programme.title: Legend of the Hidden City
programme.desc: 1997. Stars Brendan Pollecutt, Fezile Mpela & Robert Finlayson. Things get scary for Dean and Thabo. They start to lose hope of returning safely.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sir Lancelot
programme.desc: Knight Errant. 1957. Stars William Russell, Cyril Smith & Ronald Leigh-Hunt. Two sisters are left a small kingdom by the father, but the older girl is being set up to marry by her guardian. [S]

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Unkindest Tut of All. 1967. Stars Adam West, Burt Ward & Yvonne Craig. Tut fakes crime predictions to gain police trust, then lures them away to steal scrolls tied to a statue of cosmic power. [S]

programme.title: The Roy Rogers Show
programme.desc: Johnny Rover. 1955. Stars Roy Rogers, Trigger and Dale Evans. A tyrannical Boston financier travels to Mineral City to confront his son and stirs up trouble. [S]

programme.title: Captain Scarlet and the Mysterons
programme.desc: Spectrum Strikes Back. 1967. Stars Sylvia Anderson, Ed Bishop & Paul Maxwell. Spectrum leaders go to a secret conference to present new anti-Mysteron devices, but the Mysterons plan to interfere. [S]

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: The Surgeon. 1959. Stars: Conrad Phillips, Willoughby Goddard & Jennifer Jayne. Seriously wounded, Tell is taken to the home of a Swiss surgeon. To throw Gessler off their trail. [S]

programme.title: The Buccaneers
programme.desc: Dangerous Cargo. 1957. Stars Robert Shaw, Sarah Lawson & Ivan Craig. Tempest is tasked with transferring a very important passenger to Barbados under the watchful eye of the Spanish. [S]

programme.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: The Scientist. 1956. Stars Richard Greene, Alan Wheatley & Archie Duncan. A scientist who is being hunted down, after developing a terrifying new weapon, seeks Robin's help. [S]

programme.title: Destination Space
programme.desc: 1959. Sci-fi. Directed by Joseph Penvey. Stars Harry Townes, John Agar & Charles Aidman. The U.S. attempts to launch a mission to the Moon, but the plan is disrupted when a meteor strikes. [S]

programme.title: Dial 999
programme.desc: Missing Person. 1958. Stars Robert Beatty, Barbara Steele & Vera Day. Maguire must adopt unusual tactics when the bodies of three girls are found in the Thames, with no obvious reason why. [S]

programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: 1948. Thriller. Directed by Alfred Roome and starring Jack Warner, George Cole, David Tomlinson and Bill Owen. Two convicts escape, handcuffed to each other and things get worse when they're seen. [S]

programme.title: Scotland Yard
programme.desc: 1961. The Never Never Murder. Directed by Peter Duffell. Starring Russell Napier, Genine Graham and Maurice Good. A dead body sets the police on the track of a fraudster. (S1, E37)

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Stage for Two. 1961. Stars Peter Graves, Leonard Teale & Peter Guest. Cobb is hijacked by a bank robber running from the law and his gang. When the gang catch up, it is unclear who is the threat. [S]

programme.title: Reach For The Sky
programme.desc: 1956. War drama. Directed by Lewis Gilbert and stars Kenneth More, Muriel Pavlow and Lyndon Brook. This is the true story of Douglas Bader, who loses his legs but returns to flight during WW2. [S]

programme.title: Maigret
programme.desc: A Man Condemned. 1963. Stars Rupert Davies, Patricia Laffan & Terence de Marney. Tomorrow a man must die on the guillotine, unless Maigret can demolish the case he himself built up against him. [S]

programme.title: The Duchess of Duke Street
programme.desc: For Love or Money. 1976. Stars Gemma Jones, Leigh Lawson & Angharad Rees. A con artist who is posing as a Baron, dupes a greedy American guest and seduces a lonely young bride. [S]

programme.title: Honest, Decent and True
programme.desc: 1986. Drama. Director: Les Blair. Stars Derrick O'Connor, Richard E Grant, Gary Oldman & Adrian Edmondson. An advertising firm struggles through the launch of a new lager in 1980s London. [S]

programme.title: Fortean TV
programme.desc: 1997. Hosted by Reverend Lionel Fanthorpe. Tonight, meet a cow that some people believe to be holy, a couple who saw a vision of a 100 year old Monk and watch rare footage of the Swedish lake monster.

programme.title: One Step Beyond
programme.desc: Emergency Only. 1959. Starring Lin McCarthy, Paula Raymond and Jocelyn Brando. Whilst at a party, Ellen predicts a series of events that tests a sceptical witness's belief to the full. [S]
